Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to create a Python dictionary representation of the log skeleton We have keys equivalence always_before always_after never_together activ_freq and directly_follows

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process includes Receive Order RO then Check Availability CA then Reserve Items RI then Pick Items PI Quality Check QC Pack Order PO Generate Shipping Label GSL Dispatch D Invoice Customer IC Record Payment RP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Possibly if two activities are equivalent meaning they are always executed together For example maybe we have equivalence between some steps

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will assume equivalence between IC and RP every invoice has a payment or vice versa So equivalence IC RP and RP IC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process begins with receiving order then check stock then reserve items then pick items then quality check then pack order then generate shipping label then dispatch then invoice then record payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I can define for each activity RO 1 CA 1 RI 1 PI 1 QC 1 PO 1 GSL 1 D 1 IC 1 RP 1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequential order from beginning to end RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Maybe no activities are mutually exclusive in this process so never_together set

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: I think it might be safe to set always_before to an empty set or include one obvious non immediate constraint Let me use always_before RP IC because invoice must occur before payment

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Maybe I can define always_after to express eventual ordering I will set always_after PO IC RI PI QC D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check our chain RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP so invoice comes before payment and the later activities occur after the earlier ones so these constraints fit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will output this dictionary log_skeleton equivalence IC RP RP IC always_before RP IC always_after PO IC RI PI QC D never_together set activ_freq each activity 1 directly_follows RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP
